ett.raw_estimand: ((Sum[Z](P[Z](X) * P[Z](Y) * P(Z)) / Sum[Y, Z](Sum[Z](P[Z](X) * P[Z](Y) * P(Z)))))
ett.observational_estimand: ((Sum[Z](P(X | Z) * P(Y | Z) * P(Z)) / Sum[Y, Z](Sum[Z](P(X | Z) * P(Y | Z) * P(Z)))))
